allow: Bash(python -c "import zipfile; import xml.etree.ElementTree as ET; z = zipfile.ZipFile\(r''C:\\Users\\aditya.sanjay\\Downloads\\GenAI_Developer_Project_Roadmap_2026 \(1\).docx''\); tree = ET.parse\(z.open\(''word/document.xml''\)\); ns = {''w'': ''http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/wordprocessingml/2006/main''}; paragraphs = tree.findall\(''.//w:p'', ns\); text = ''\\n''.join\(''''.join\(node.text for node in p.findall\(''.//w:t'', ns\) if node.text\) for p in paragraphs\); print\(text\)")
